arts.ttl: Bournemouth, Nottingham Forest Push Hard for £35M-Rated Chelsea Loanee Wanted by PSG
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been leaning more on Ligue 1 talent to build a younger, more dynamic squad in recent windows. The arrivals of Bradley Barcola and Desire Doue from domestic rivals are clear examples of that shift.
